items.title: As reported yesterday, the Clippers remain interested in re-signing restricted free agent Bennedict Mathurin, who’s drawn sign-and-trade interest from several teams.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt:
As reported yesterday, the Clippers remain interested in re-signing restricted free agent Bennedict Mathurin, who’s drawn sign-and-trade interest from several teams.

More reporting on Anthony Davis, Trae Young, Miles Bridges, Jonathan Kuminga, Cam Johnson, Dennis Schroder below.

items.title: The Los Angeles Clippers have tendered Bennedict Mathurin a qualifying offer, making him a restricted free agent, league sources told HoopsHype. The 24-year-old swingman averaged a career-high 17.6 points last season.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Los Angeles Clippers have tendered Bennedict Mathurin a qualifying offer, making him a restricted free agent, league sources told HoopsHype. The 24-year-old swingman averaged a career-high 17.6 points last season.

items.title: The LA Clippers have extended qualifying offers to Bennedict Mathurin, Jordan Miller, and Kobe Sanders
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
The LA Clippers have extended qualifying offers to Bennedict Mathurin, Jordan Miller, and Kobe Sanders

They will all be restricted free agents

More to come over next few hours
